title: ADR, contracts and stable file identity
objective: Accept ADR-0025, add file organization contracts, and introduce stable file identity that does not depend on relative paths.
write_scope: .desc.json files and PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml if structure changes
non_goals: Do not implement physical file moves in this task.
Do not introduce S3 as a runtime dependency.
Do not remove current MemorySourceObject ingestion compatibility.
Do not store host-specific paths in default contracts.
requirements: File identity must use a stable file_id, not relative_path.
File version identity must include sha256 and size.
Path history must preserve old relative paths for audit and search compatibility.
Contracts must validate source organization profile, incoming path, managed root policy, storage backend and delete policy.
Default contracts must avoid real host-specific paths and secrets.
acceptance_checks: validate_architecture_contracts accepts the new contract shape.
Unit tests show that moving the same file to another path keeps the same stable file identity when hash/metadata match policy.
Unit tests show that identical hash duplicates can be represented without losing path history.
Documentation explains why relative_path is not an identifier.
